surfaces.title: The Ginger People - Ginger and Turmeric Food and Beverages
surfaces.meta_description: Fresh ginger and turmeric products that are non-GMO, vegan, and gluten free. Try GIN GINS®, Ginger Rescue®, Juices & Sushi Ginger today.
surfaces.text_excerpt: CHOOSE YOUR LOCATION: NORTH AMERICA EUROPE ASIA PACIFIC PRODUCTS BULK INGREDIENTS RECIPES ABOUT BLOG WHERE TO BUY WORLD’S #1 SELLING GINGER CANDY Close to Freshness, Close to Heart Real Ginger. Real Benefits. Real Delicious. SHOP NOW Discover What Fans Love About The Ginger People At The Ginger People, we’re more than just a brand—we’re a community of people who believe in the power of ginger and turmeric to improve your health and wellbeing. Thank You for Changing My Life! For over 6 years I have suffered from numerous conditions and have not found relief despite various treatments and medications and dietary changes ~ G.C. SHOP FIJI GINGER JUICE Natural Remedy for Upset Stomach As a mother of seven and grandmother of seven, I’ve dealt with plenty of motion sickness, morning sickness and digestive discomfort ~ Susan SHOP HARD GINGER LOZENGES Changed my life! I was recently diagnosed with Trigeminal Neuralgia a few days before my 33rd birthday. Aside from my prescription meds, I struggled to find ~ Natalie SHOP TURMERIC GINGERADE Your products have been a godsend! I am writing to thank you for your amazing products. I broke my ankle 7 weeks ago. Somehow, a few weeks after surgery ~ Lorraine SHOP FIJI TURMERIC JUICE Amazing Stuff! I have chronic pancreatitis. Since I knew ginger and turmeric were great natural anti-inflammatory substances, I started trying your Ginger and Turmeric ~ Stephen SHOP TURMERIC GINGERADE Grateful! I am so grateful for these tablets. I use them along
